zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fowles Jr於1607年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾福拉可利時，他的父親John Fowles Sr20歲，母親?18歲。他於1623年4月27日與Elizabeth Seawell在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1689年在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年83歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fowles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Fowle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Scottish: variant of Foulis, a habitational name from Fowlis in Angus, or, less commonly, from Fowlis Wester in Strathearn, Perthshire.

variants.name: Fowle
meanings: English (Kent): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Foghel, Fughel (Old English Fugel, Fugol, from Old English fugol ‘fowl, bird’). Alternatively, a nickname from Middle English fughel, foghel, foul ‘fowl, bird’, either with reference to physical appearance, size, or behavior, or possibly also a nickname for someone who kept or sold birds.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fowles Jr was born in 1607, in Flaxley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, John Fowles Sr, was 20 and his mother, ?, was 18. He married Elizabeth Seawell on 27 April 1623, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1689, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 83.

ko.lifeSummary: John Fowles Jr(이)가 1607년 영국 그루스스터실르 플라스리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fowles Sr(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 ?(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1623년 4월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Elizabeth Seawell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1689년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fowles Jr родился в 1607 г. в местности флаксли, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Fowles Sr было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали ?, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Seawell 27 апреля 1623 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1689 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет.
